/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/server.dir/DirectoryScanner.cc.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/KeywordProcessor.cc.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/server.cc.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/KeywordRecommender.cc.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/LengthHeaderCodec.cc.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/PageProcessor.cc.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/WebSearcher.cc.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/main.cc.o -o ../server   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lspdlog -lfmt -ltinyxml2 -lpthread
